scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,AI,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "python ai-service/app.py" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && pip install -r ai-service/requirements.txt
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:ai && npm run test:frontend
